findings.description: The hint `ojdbc6` (Oracle JDBC driver artifactId) is missing. The equivalent artifactIds for other databases are present: `db2jcc4` (DB2) and `mssql-jdbc` (SQL Server). Users searching for the Oracle driver artifact name would not find this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains `<artifactId>ojdbc6</artifactId>` in the Oracle dependency example under profiles要素内.
